arts.ttl: PART 1: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - 'We never chose for Whelan to fund the journey...just as we can’t force Danson to do the same’
arts.sum: In the first of a two-part special, our panel of Latics experts run the rule over another eventful transfer window, ahead of this weekend’s FA Cup fourth-round tie against Fulham...

arts.ttl: PART 2: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - 'Wiganers will always vote with their feet - that's 100 per cent in our DNA...’
arts.sum: In the second of a two-part special, our panel of Latics experts run the rule over another eventful transfer window, ahead of this weekend’s FA Cup fourth-round tie against Fulham...
Fulham re-sign winger Willian until the end of the season, six months after he left the club.

A 1-1 draw with Lincoln at the weekend means Wigan have won only one of their last four in all competitions. The Latics have also won only one of their last six at home. Fulham have been inconsistent...
